name: VS Code
description: Primary code editor. Enchanted with extensions for maximum productivity.

name: GitHub
description: Version control fortress. Houses all repositories and collaboration portals.

name: Docker
description: Containerization engine. Ensures consistent deployment across all realms.

name: Figma
description: Design tool of the UI artisan. Pixel-perfect mockups and prototypes.

name: Postman
description: API testing companion. Sends requests across the network realm.

name: Jira
description: Quest tracker. Manages tasks, sprints, and epic storylines.

name: Slack
description: Guild communication channel. Real-time messaging across all party members.

name: Terminal
description: Command-line interface. Direct access to system-level sorcery.

name: NPM
description: Package summoner. Calls forth libraries from the JavaScript registry.

name: Chrome DevTools
description: Browser inspection lens. Reveals the hidden DOM and network secrets.

name: Git
description: Time-travel device for code. Branch, merge, and revert through project history.

name: Linux
description: The open-source operating realm. Server management and scripting mastery.

name: AWS
description: Cloud infrastructure dominion. EC2, S3, Lambda — the pillars of deployment.

name: Redis
description: In-memory data cache. Lightning-fast reads for session and query storage.

name: Nginx
description: Reverse proxy guardian. Routes traffic and serves static assets with speed.

name: Webpack
description: Module bundler. Compiles and optimizes frontend assets into deployable bundles.

name: macOS
description: Primary operating realm. Stable Unix-based environment for development and daily questing.

name: Windows
description: Secondary operating realm. Familiar territory for enterprise tools and compatibility testing.

name: DataGrip
description: Database IDE of the data sorcerer. Query, inspect, and manage SQL realms with precision.

name: SFTP
description: Secure file transfer scroll. Moves artifacts between servers through encrypted tunnels.

name: Zoom / Eleveo
description: Video conferencing and collaboration portal. Bridges remote teams across any distance.

name: CallReplay
description: Call recording and playback artifact. Replay, review, and analyze recorded voice interactions.

name: Grafana
description: Monitoring oracle. Visualizes metrics and system vitals through real-time dashboards.

name: Miro
description: Infinite whiteboard of the architect. Maps out flows, plans, and collaborative blueprints.

name: FreePBX
description: VoIP control panel. Manages extensions, call routing, and telephony configurations.

name: Elastrix
description: Telephony platform artifact. Powers unified communications and VoIP infrastructure.

name: Wireshark
description: Network packet analyzer. Captures and deciphers raw traffic across the wire.

name: Active Directory
description: Domain authority. Manages identities, permissions, and access across the enterprise realm.
